title: Mossel Bay teacher publishes book of poems
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Mossel Bay man and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Mossel Bay man and Diaz Primary School educator, Anton Siebert, has recently published a book of poems titled Tussen Liefde en Littekens.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay man and Diaz Primary School educator, Anton Siebert, has recently published a book of poems titled Tussen Liefde en Littekens."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The book consists of 21 poems, in both English and Afrikaans, and touches on a variety of themes including love, heartbreak and faith in the Lord."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Siebert told Mossel Bay Advertiser where the inspiration behind his poetry came from.","html":"Siebert told Mossel Bay Advertiser where the inspiration behind his poetry came from."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I have been through a lot in my life, through a lot of hurt and disappointment. By writing and putting my hurt into words, it has helped me heal my broken parts and thus make myself a better man and person,\" he said.","html":"\"I have been through a lot in my life, through a lot of hurt and disappointment. By writing and putting my hurt into words, it has helped me heal my broken parts and thus make myself a better man and person,\" he said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Tussen Liefde en Littekens is his first book and one that has been a longtime coming."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Siebert decided to take a chance by self-publishing his book, believing that if only one person is touched by his work it would be more than enough.","html":"Siebert decided to take a chance by self-publishing his book, believing that if only one person is touched by his work it would be more than enough."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I wrote it as it came to my heart and then let it flow through my pen to paper,\" says Siebert of his writing process. \"Some days I could write two to three poems and then months passed before I wrote another,\" he said.","html":"\"I wrote it as it came to my heart and then let it flow through my pen to paper,\" says Siebert of his writing process. \"Some days I could write two to three poems and then months passed before I wrote another,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone interested in ordering a copy of Tussen Liefde en Littekens, can contact Siebert on 073 564 2770.","html":"Anyone interested in ordering a copy of Tussen Liefde en Littekens, can contact Siebert on 073 564 2770."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Mossel Bay teacher publishes book of poems
